description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The back is a smooth, metallic or glass surface in a deep blue color, adorned with a prominent, centered Apple logo. The rear upper left corner houses a triple camera array with three lenses and a flash, all set within a slightly raised square module. The sides are flat and appear to be made of metal, with minimal visible buttons or ports. The device is thin and compact, designed for handheld use, and exudes a premium, minimalist aesthetic typical of recent iPhone models.
description: A sleek, blue smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge black glass screen with a subtle blue abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the device's slim, flat metallic edge with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the deep blue surface, centered Apple logo, and triple camera array in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thin, flat edge with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark, abstract blue wallpaper with concentric arcs and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular pattern within a square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible in the provided views.
